name: @career-ops/desktop
description: Career-ops desktop client — bridge + dashboard in one app
author: Hongxi Chen <smyhc1@gmail.com>

scripts.build:server: pnpm --filter @career-ops/shared run build && pnpm --filter @career-ops/server run build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:preload && pnpm run build:main
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:preload && NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" electron src/main.ts
scripts.start: pnpm run build:preload && NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" electron src/main.ts
